underlying_goal: Maintain and improve a Mälartåg train departure service: connect to GitHub, debug missing trains, fix UI, fix location detection, deploy/version changes, and restore healthcheck
friction_detail: Claude misunderstood 'healthchecks (tågsida)' as needing to update a separate script (tagforseningar.py) instead of fixing the healthcheck endpoint in maltag_service; user interrupted and asked to revert changes.
brief_summary: User wanted to maintain their Mälartåg service (debug missing trains, fix UI, fix zone detection, deploy with versioning, restore healthcheck) — all tasks were completed successfully despite one misunderstanding that was reverted.
